MV QI HONG , 56K/11, OPEN MIZUSHIMA, JAPAN O/A 29TH NOV ,2025  
BOD ABT 850MTS VLSFO/110MTS LSMGO
CLINKER/ DIRTY /2X20 COILS/DECK OK 
TRY ANY INCL INDIA/BANGLADESH
 
MV QI HONG 
DWT 56,132MT SSW ON 12.715M, SDBC
BUILT 2011 AT JAPAN, CLASS CCS, FLAG P.R. CHINA , LOA 189.99M,
BEAM 32.25M
G/N 31,815MT/18,561MT, TPC 56.4 , H/H 5/5, GRAIN/BALE
71177.2/68733.2
4 X 30MT CRANES, 4 X 12CBM
SPEED AND CONSUMPTIONS
ABOUT 11.2KONT ABOUT 23.0MT VLSFO LADEN PLUS ABOUT 0.1MT LSMGO EXCL
BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING/WORKING
ABOUT 12.5KONT ABOUT 21.5MT VLSFO BALLAST PLUS ABOUT 0.1MT LSMGO EXCL
BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING/WORKING
IN PORT WORKING ABOUT 3.5MT VLSFO PLUS ABOUT 0.1MT LSMGO
IN PORT IDLE         ABOUT 2.0MT VLSFO PLUS ABOUT 0.1MT LSMGO
VLSFO 380 SPEC: RMG 380 ISO 8217 2010             LSMGO SPEC: DMA  ISO 8217
2010
ADA
OWNERS WARRANT THE VESSEL IS CAPABLE OF MAINTAINING AND SHALL MAINTAIN
THROUGHOUT THE PERIOD OF THE CHARTER PARTY, FROM BEGINNING SEA PASSAGE TO
END SEA PASSAGE, THE SPEED AND CONSUMPTION IS GIVEN UNDER GOOD CONDITIONS
NOT EXCEEDING BEAUFORT SCALE 4 AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3, WITH NO ADVERSE
CURRENTS, AND WITH COMBINED WAVE AND SWELL HEIGHTS NTE 1.25M, (FAVORABLE
CURRENT IN OWNER' BENEFIT ) AND WITH NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, AND
ALWAYS EXCLUDING BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING OPERATIONS. WITH NO ADVERSE
CURRENTS AND EXCLUDING PERIODS DURING REDUCTIONS OF SPEED FOR SAFETY,
AVOIDING PIRACY THREATS, CONGESTION OR REDUCED VISIBILITY, ETC.
REFERRING TO VESSEL SPEED AND CONSUMPTION IT IS AGREED THAT 'ABOUT' IS
DEFINED AS 5% MORE ON BUNKER CONSUMPTION AND 0.5 KNOTS LESS ON VESSEL SPEED.
ANY PERFORMANCE EVALUATION REPORT SUBMITTED TO OWNERS MUST REFLECT ALL
RELATED TERMS AGREED IN VESSEL'S DESCRIPTION INCLUDING THE OFF-SETS AND
ALLOWING FOR BOTH 'ABOUTS'..
